title: Are You Sure?
description: A simple mod confirms if you truly want to place a block with a placement confirmation pop-up!
body:
![Are You Sure? Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c154180cb2468cbfb8ba3b592bada39b81d860cc.png)
## This mod is inspired by [Knarfy](https://www.youtube.com/knarfy)'s "[Nobody Asked](https://modrinth.com/mod/nobody-asked)" mod.
[![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fmodrinth_vector.svg&%3Bn=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/are-you-sure)[![CurseForge](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fcurseforge_vector.svg&%3Bn=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/are-you-sure)

This mod adds a pop-up confirmation to ask if you want to truly have a block placed. (Seen below.)
![Are you sure?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4938068800e560c579bd50f466dbbab711cbaca0_0.webp)


If you want to click "YES!" it will place your block! If you click no...well. 
![BOOM!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc19d242e2ddbe5421c0611b741930404dbcb004_0.webp)
**_BOOM!_**

**That's it.** That's all there is to the mod. A really fun and annoying one to have on a server with friends!

## FAQ:
_"Can I use this in my modpack?"_

**Yes of course you can. Can't wait to see the fun people can have with this mod!**
